title: Cloud Infrastructure Command Center
description: A polished operations dashboard for AWS workloads with real-time health monitoring, cost visibility, and deployment signals for engineering teams.
detailedDescription: This project reframes cloud operations as a product experience. I designed a cross-platform Flutter dashboard connected to AWS services so teams can monitor service health, track cost drift, review deployment status, and respond faster to incidents. The emphasis is on clear information hierarchy, lightweight automation, and interfaces that help operators make confident decisions quickly.
features: Unified view of cloud health, alerts, and release status
Cost insights and trend summaries surfaced for faster decision-making
Serverless backend patterns for responsive and scalable monitoring workflows

title: Budgeting + Insights Platform
description: A production-style finance platform that combines budgeting workflows, anomaly detection, and cloud-native delivery with a modern React dashboard.
detailedDescription: Built as a showcase of end-to-end engineering maturity, this platform uses microservices to separate transaction ingestion, analytics, and reporting concerns. Infrastructure is automated with Terraform, workloads are containerized for Kubernetes, and the UI focuses on turning raw data into accessible insight. The project demonstrates both platform thinking and the importance of presentation quality for technical products.
features: Interactive dashboards for budgets, anomalies, and trend snapshots
Infrastructure as code and CI/CD workflow designed for repeatable delivery
Microservice architecture that cleanly separates ingestion, analytics, and presentation

title: AI-Powered Portfolio Analyzer
description: An ML-assisted web experience that evaluates portfolio composition, highlights risk patterns, and surfaces personalized recommendations in a clearer visual flow.
detailedDescription: This application combines predictive analytics with a strong front-end experience. Historical market data is processed through machine learning models to generate risk assessments, diversification guidance, and trend-aware recommendations. The interface emphasizes readability and confidence, making complex financial concepts easier to evaluate at a glance.
features: Risk scoring and diversification analysis backed by ML models
Recommendation flows designed to explain outcomes, not just output numbers
Containerized deployment approach for consistent development and delivery

title: Real-Time Collaboration Suite
description: A secure messaging and collaboration experience built with Flutter and Firebase, focused on responsive communication and smooth cross-platform usability.
detailedDescription: This project explores how a communication product can feel fast, reliable, and intuitive across devices. It uses Firebase for realtime sync and Flutter for a shared UI codebase, pairing messaging, media sharing, and collaboration flows with a stronger design sensibility than typical demo apps. The result is a cleaner, more credible case study for mobile and full-stack delivery.
features: Realtime chat architecture with responsive UX across devices
Support for file sharing, call-ready interaction patterns, and conversation context
Cross-platform implementation strategy that balances speed and maintainability
